reasoning: Without the ability to query specific 2025 stats via search, I rely on the structural differences in how Spotify calculates 'most streamed artist' vs 'most monthly listeners'. Billie Eilish recently took the #1 spot for monthly listeners (August 2024), but 'most streamed artist' (total volume over a year) always heavily favors artists with enormous, highly active catalogs (Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Drake). Billie has just 3 full studio albums, making it extraordinarily difficult to generate the daily stream volume (usually 80M+ daily needed) required to beat Taylor Swift across a full 365 days in 2025. The probability of her achieving this over Swift or The Weeknd is extremely low.
